prestazioni: Engine swap to a Toyota 1NZ-FE (1.5L) with a custom forced-induction setup using a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger, paired with a Tomei 260° camshaft kit and a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system by HKS Hi-Power Spec-R

Upgraded fuel system featuring a Walbro 450 LPH fuel pump, Injector Dynamics ID1000 fuel injectors, and a custom ECU tune via Haltech Elite 1500 with launch control and flat-foot shifting for the 5-speed manual transmission

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers, Cusco 22mm front sway bar, and Whiteline adjustable rear control arms to handle the added power and reduce body roll during aggressive cornering
estetica: Custom Rocket Bunny-inspired widebody kit by TRA Kyoto, designed specifically for the F300 chassis with extended fenders, aggressive side skirts, and a vented hood for improved airflow
Enkei PF07 17x9 wheels in matte black with a +38mm offset, wrapped in Toyo R888R 235/40R17 tires for maximum grip and a staggered fitment
Full carbon fiber aero package by Seibon, including a front lip spoiler, rear diffuser, and a ducktail spoiler to reduce lift and improve high-speed stability
